home.subtitle: Your gateway to personalized learning. Book lessons, manage your sessions, and more.
home.companyCta: Do you want to register as a company?
home.companyCtaDesc: Are you running an ESL center? Join the Brightfolks platform and manage your students, teachers, and schedules — all in one place.

learnMore.title: Why Choose Brightfolks?
learnMore.servicesDesc: Monitor your ESL center's performance and student progress all in one place.
learnMore.personalizedDesc: Easily manage your students, teachers, and class schedules without the hassle.
learnMore.flexibleDesc: Whether you're a small home-based ESL center or a growing institution, we've got you covered.
learnMore.subjectsDesc: Set up your own packages and offer as many subjects as your center needs.

features.title: Everything Your ESL Center Needs
features.subtitle: A complete system designed for students, teachers, and ESL center owners.
features.scheduleDesc: Students can schedule their classes on their own — no need to ask or constantly inquire.
features.slotsDesc: Students can browse available time slots and pick what works best for them.
features.progressDesc: Students can monitor their remaining sessions and view class reports anytime.
features.teacherDesc: Teachers can easily submit feedback after class and manage their own availability.
features.growthDesc: ESL center owners get a clear view of their growth, bookings, and overall activity.
features.accessDesc: Access your ESL center anytime, anywhere — from any device, at your own pace. Translations are also available, just click the globe icon.

student.feedbackSuccess: Feedback submitted! Your teacher and admin have been notified.
student.feedbackFailed: Failed to submit feedback. Please try again.
student.waitlistHint: Select a teacher, date, and time slot you want to be notified about when it becomes available.
student.waitlistSuccess: Added to waitlist! You'll be notified when the slot opens.
student.noWaitlist: No waitlist entries. Click "Join Waitlist" to be notified when a slot opens up.
student.cancelPolicyMsg: Cancellation of classes within {{hours}} hour(s) of the scheduled time is not allowed.
student.cancelPolicyNote: If you cannot attend the class, you will be marked as absent and the session will be deducted accordingly. Your teacher has been notified.
student.cancelConfirm: Are you sure you want to cancel this class? Your teacher and admin will be notified.
student.choosePackage: Choose a class package to enroll in.
student.alipayInst1: Please add the contact card as a friend first
student.alipayInst2: Transfer the money after a few hours from adding
student.alipayInst4: Send the receipt directly to the company
student.commPlatformMsg: Please message me in our communication platform and you can send the payment there.
student.commPlatformNote: Transactions will be handled via WeChat, Zalo, or other communication platforms.
student.contactAdmin: Contact your admin for payment instructions.
student.transactionLabel: Last 5 Digits of Transaction Order Number
student.transactionHint: Enter the last 5 digits of your transaction/order number from your payment receipt.

timeslot.title: Available Time Slots
timeslot.timezoneNote: All times shown in Philippine / China / Singapore / Hong Kong time (UTC+8)
timeslot.durationNote: Your {{duration}}-minute class will automatically book {{slots}} consecutive timeslots (1 session deducted).
timeslot.confirmSingle: Are you sure you want to book this schedule? This will use one session from your package.
timeslot.confirmMulti: Are you sure you want to book this {{duration}}-minute class? This will book {{slots}} consecutive timeslots and use 1 session from your package.
timeslot.noTeachers: No teachers available at this time. Please choose a different slot.

pwa.pushDescription: Receive notifications even when the app is closed

profile.title: My Profile
profile.passwordHint: Leave blank to keep current password
